text:
Information 
System Identifier (MSIS_ID). 
SHORT NAME: MSIS_ID 
LONG NAME: MSIS_ID 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
32 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 
FILE(S): 
All header claim, line, and occurrence code files 
VALUES: 
Alphanumeric character string, 32 characters 
(Ex. 9Q81866B302C768A539BBE79FFB835FB) 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 
COMMENT: 
The MSIS ID is unique only within a state for a year; a beneficiary’s MSIS ID may change longitudinally. 
Additional details are
